mapper.update: INSERT INTO ST_STOCK_MASTER (ID, CREATE_DATE, UPDATE_DATE, STOCK_ID) VALUES ( get_seq('ST_STOCK_MASTER'), NOW(), NOW(), #{stockId}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE UPDATE_DATE = NOW(), STOCK_ID = #{stockId}
mapper.select: with BASE_YMD AS( select MAX(YYYYMMDD) YMD, 'D-DAY' INDEX_TYPE from ST_STOCK_MARKET_INDEX union all select MIN(YYYYMMDD) YMD, 'D-1W' INDEX_TYPE from ST_STOCK_MARKET_INDEX where STR_TO_DATE(YYYYMMDD,'%Y%m%d') >= DATE_ADD(NOW(), interval-7 day) union all select MIN(YYYYMMDD) YMD, 'D-2W' INDEX_TYPE from ST_STOCK_MARKET_INDEX where STR_TO_DATE(YYYYMMDD,'%Y%m%d') >= DATE_ADD(NOW(), interval-14 day) union all select MIN(YYYYMMDD) YMD, 'D-3W' INDEX_TYPE from ST_STOCK_MARKET_INDEX where STR_TO_DATE(YYYYMMDD,'%Y%m%d') >= DATE_ADD(NOW(), interval-21 day) union all select MIN(YYYYMMDD) YMD, 'D-1M' INDEX_TYPE from ST_STOCK_MARKET_INDEX where STR_TO_DATE(YYYYMMDD,'%Y%m%d') >= DATE_ADD(NOW(), interval-1 month) union all select MIN(YYYYMMDD) YMD, 'D-2M' INDEX_TYPE from ST_STOCK_MARKET_INDEX where STR_TO_DATE(YYYYMMDD,'%Y%m%d') >= DATE_ADD(NOW(), interval-2 month) union all select MIN(YYYYMMDD) YMD, 'D-3M' INDEX_TYPE from ST_STOCK_MARKET_INDEX where STR_TO_DATE(YYYYMMDD,'%Y%m%d') >= DATE_ADD(NOW(), interval-3 month) union all select MIN(YYYYMMDD) YMD, 'D-1Y' INDEX_TYPE from ST_STOCK_MARKET_INDEX where STR_TO_DATE(YYYYMMDD,'%Y%m%d') >= DATE_ADD(NOW(), interval-1 year) union all select MIN(YYYYMMDD) YMD, 'D-2Y' INDEX_TYPE from ST_STOCK_MARKET_INDEX where STR_TO_DATE(YYYYMMDD,'%Y%m%d') >= DATE_ADD(NOW(), interval-2 year) union all select MIN(YYYYMMDD) YMD, 'D-3Y' INDEX_TYPE from ST_STOCK_MARKET_INDEX where STR_TO_DATE(YYYYMMDD,'%Y%m%d') >= DATE_ADD(NOW(), interval-3 year) ) select B.INDEX_TYPE indexType , ID id, CREATE_DATE createDate, UPDATE_DATE updateDate, DELETE_YN deleteYn, YYYYMMDD yyyymmdd, DOMESTIC_INTEREST_CALL domesticInterestCall , DOMESTIC_INTEREST_CD domesticInterestCd, DOMESTIC_INTEREST_COFIX_MANF domesticInterestCofixManf, DOMESTIC_INTEREST_COFIX_OUTB domesticInterestCofixOutb , DOMESTIC_INTEREST_NCOFIX_OUTB domesticInterestNcofixOutb, STANDARD_INTEREST_US standardInterestUs, STANDARD_INTEREST_KR standardInterestKr , STANDARD_INTEREST_EU standardInterestEu, STANDARD_INTEREST_GB standardInterestGb, STANDARD_INTEREST_JP standardInterestJp, METAL_GC metalGc , METAL_CMDT metalCmdt, METAL_SI metalSi, METAL_HG metalHg, METAL_PL metalPl, TRANSPORT_CCF transportCcf, TRANSPORT_SCF transportScf, TRANSPORT_BADI transportBadi , TRANSPORT_BACK transportBack, TRANSPORT_BPNI transportBpni, TRANSPORT_BSIS transportBsis, TRANSPORT_BHSI transportBhsi, TRANSPORT_BAID transportBaid , TRANSPORT_BAIT transportBait, BOND_US10YT bondUs10yt, BOND_KR10YT bondKr10yt, BOND_JP10YT bondJp10yt, BOND_DE10YT bondDe10yt, BOND_CN10YT bondCn10yt , ENERGY_CL energyCl, ENERGY_LCO energyLco, ENERGY_RB energyRb, ENERGY_HO energyHo, ENERGY_DCB energyDcb from ST_STOCK_MARKET_INDEX MI, BASE_YMD B where MI.YYYYMMDD = B.YMD order by B.YMD DESC
